---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Musonic
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the situation where you felt something was missing.

> Example: "When I'm driving, I can't easily skip to the next track without unlocking my phone."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible about how it should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other ways to solve the same problem?

## Additional Context

Mockups, screenshots from other apps, or any other context that helps illustrate the request.
